rationale: Governs the lifecycle and annual review of the information security policy required by PCI.
Mandates execution of TRAs for any controls validated using the Customized Approach.
Defines the security organization and assigns executive accountability for CDE protection.
Ensures the Incident Response Plan includes 24/7/365 coverage and escalation paths.
Operationalizes network ACLs and firewalls as authorization boundaries (deny-all default).
Enforces strict restriction of access to cardholder data based on business need-to-know.
Mandates Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA) for ALL access to the CDE (remote and internal).
Enforces immediate revocation of terminated users and disablement of inactive accounts (90 days).
Enforces minimum length (12+ chars) and complexity if MFA is not present.
Controls and logs physical entry to sensitive areas (data centers/server rooms) housing CDE.
Mandates system hardening (benchmarks) and removal of vendor default credentials.
Enforces secure coding standards (OWASP) and vulnerability management in the SDLC.
Governs the authorization and integrity of scripts loaded in payment pages to prevent skimming.
Maintains inventory of proprietary code to ensure inclusion in vulnerability scans.
Governs encryption of PAN at rest and strict key management procedures.
Requires strong cryptography (TLS 1.2+) for data transmission over public networks.
Operationalizes anti-malware deployment and ensures mechanisms cannot be disabled by users.
Deploys FIM tools to detect unauthorized changes to critical system files and configs.
Mandates generation protection and daily review of audit logs for forensic trails.
Establishes the Incident Response Plan (IRP) for immediate reaction to CDE breaches.
Operationalizes vulnerability scans penetration testing and IDS/IPS maintenance schedules.
Requires mechanism to detect tampering with payment page headers/content (7-day frequency).
Requires inventory and classification of data assets enabling accurate PCI Scoping.
Enforces display masking (e.g. first 6 last 4) of PAN on screens for unauthorized personnel.
Governs due diligence and AOC collection for Third-Party Service Providers (TPSPs).
Operationalizes secure destruction of media containing cardholder data prior to disposal.
Governs the formal security awareness education program for all personnel.
